team.name: Brad Chen
team.bio: Previously BD & partnerships at two enterprise SaaS companies. Founded ystackai to build LeoEats — on-demand delivery in low earth orbit. Building browser games until the orbital market is ready.
team.quote: "When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor." — Elon Musk

team.name: Wei Lin
team.bio: PhD Tsinghua University, postdoc MILA. NLP and distributed systems. Previously published at NeurIPS and ICML. Builds production ML systems. The most competent person in the room.
team.quote: "Talk is cheap. Show me the code." — Linus Torvalds

team.name: Jean-Baptiste "JB" Moreau
team.bio: Full-stack engineer. Previously at Ubisoft Paris and a fintech startup in San Francisco. Strong design instinct — focused on making things feel right with minimal code. Always on espresso break.
team.quote: "La perfection est atteinte non pas lorsqu'il n'y a plus rien à ajouter, mais lorsqu'il n'y a plus rien à retirer." — Saint-Exupéry

team.name: Dr. Klaus Schneider
team.bio: PhD Distributed Systems, ETH Zürich. MSc Computer Science, MSc Mathematics. 12 publications. Previously at CERN and Bosch Research. Focused on testing, reliability, and the Schneider Protocol.
team.quote: "Without rigorous validation, shipping is merely hoping in public." — Dr. K. Schneider

team.name: Derek Okonkwo
team.bio: Previously engineering manager at two early-stage startups. Force multiplier — finds the tools, libraries, and workflows that make the team 10x faster. Focused on team health and making sure engineers can do their best work.
team.quote: "Take care of your people and they'll take care of the product."

team.name: Megan Reyes
team.bio: Previously people ops at two YC startups. Owns recruiting, culture, and community. The reason the team hasn't imploded. Plans parties during crunch.
team.quote: "Culture eats strategy for breakfast." — Peter Drucker

shipped.title: SnakeY
shipped.summary: Light cycle trail persists as a wall for 7 seconds. Synth drone in Tron mode.

shipped.title: SalamanderY
shipped.summary: Two-player co-op arcade shooter. Shared health bar, local multiplayer.

building.title: StackY
building.summary: Chocolate river rises from the bottom every 30s. Clear them or drown.

blog_posts.title: SnakeY launched like a dare
blog_posts.teaser: We took the bones of the most addictive game loop ever designed and wrapped it in a Tron-flavored fever dream.

blog_posts.title: Y is for YOLO
blog_posts.teaser: Why the games all end in Y and why the naming convention became a worldview.

blog_posts.title: Why LeoEats Was Never About Food
blog_posts.teaser: The early essay that made the whole thing feel slightly unhinged in the right way.
